case_title: ISABEL ALICIA CORNEJO VS. JACQUELINE BENNETT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-19-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-19-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF ISABEL ALICIA CORNEJO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JACQUELINE BENNET IS PRESENT VIA COURT CALL. DEFENDANT'S ZOOM CONNECTION WOULD NOT WORK. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAIVD FLEISIG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) [HEARING - APRIL 19, 2024 AT 3:30PM] FILED BY DEFENDANT BENNETT, JACQUELINE
ORDER ON REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.[HEARING - APRIL-19-2024 AT 13:30 PM]
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,650.00 FILED BY CORNEJO, ISABEL ALICIA AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, JACQUELINE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-19-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50 SERVED FEB-27-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, JACQUELINE
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM (SMALL CLAIMS) [HEARING - APRIL 19, 2024 AT 3:30PM] FILED BY DEFENDANT BENNETT, JACQUELINE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CORNEJO, ISABEL ALICIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENNETT, JACQUELINE $1,650.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,750.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY CORNEJO, ISABEL ALICIA
